---
title: "Free access to my pipeline in 'Docking using T4 lysozyme L99A' "
date: 2026-06-20
categories: [pipeline preparation, docking pipeline, pipeline access]
---

:::: {.pixel-frame}

# Pipeline
Access my pipeline on GitHub:

![](/images/git_logo.png){width=100px .pixel-art}

[GitHub <3 obssxed-cell](https://github.com/obssxed-cell/docking-pipeline){.btn .btn-outline-dark}

:::

---


See my [About page](/about.qmd) for more on my background.
